name: Target Circle (Circlewise)
description: Target Circle Publisher API used by Circlewise publishers. Search available offers, fetch offer details and ads, generate tracking codes/deeplinks, and retrieve publisher performance reports.

credential_fields.name: api_token
credential_fields.label: Publisher API token
credential_fields.description: Target Circle / Circlewise publisher API token.

tools.name: offers_list
tools.description: List available publisher offers/trades from Target Circle. The live v1 endpoint returns offers grouped by ad inventory. Supports filtering by offer, advertiser, status, ad inventory, provider, category, vertical, country, currency, start/end dates, and pagination.

limit.description: Maximum number of offer groups to return. Target Circle rejects values above 50.

offerSid.description: Offer slug/SID filter from the Target Circle tester.

offerId.description: Offer ID filter from the Publisher API docs.

offerName.description: Offer name filter. Comma-separated values mean OR.

status.description: Offer status filter, for example accepted.

adInventory.description: Ad inventory filter from the Publisher API docs.

advertiser.description: Advertiser filter. Comma-separated values mean OR.

country.description: Country filter. Comma-separated values mean OR.

currency.description: Currency code, for example EUR or USD.

provider.description: Provider filter. Comma-separated values mean OR.

category.description: Category filter. Comma-separated values mean OR.

vertical.description: Vertical filter. Comma-separated values mean OR.

tools.name: offer_get
tools.description: Fetch one offer by slug/SID, including provider, advertiser, ad inventories, tracking/deeplinking settings, policies, target countries, and target URL.

tools.name: offer_ads_list
tools.description: List text and banner ads for an offer. Use together with codes_list type filters when you need specific ad assets.

tools.name: codes_list
tools.description: Generate/list tracking codes and click URLs for an offer/ad inventory, optionally with a deeplink and tracking parameters. The live API requires at least one parameters[...] query value, such as parameters[ref1] or parameters[source_id].

limit.description: Maximum number of codes to return.

offerSid.description: Offer slug/SID from the official tester.

offerId.description: Offer ID from the Publisher API docs.

adInventorySid.description: Ad inventory slug/SID from the official tester.

adInventory.description: Ad inventory identifier from the Publisher API docs.

deeplink.description: Optional destination URL to deep-link to when the offer permits deeplinking.

parameters[ref1].description: Publisher reference/sub ID 1. Include at least one parameters[...] value; the live API returns 500 when the parameters object is omitted.

type.description: Ad/code type, for example text or banner.

tools.name: transactions_list
tools.description: List transactions from the live Target Circle publisher tester endpoint. Filter by currency, saved date range, offer/ad inventory, country, transaction type, conversion status, reference, and sort options.

limit.description: Maximum number of transactions to return. The live publisher endpoint is documented/tested with a maximum of 25.

savedFrom.description: Saved date lower bound, for example 2026-05-01.

savedTo.description: Saved date upper bound, for example 2026-05-25.

country.description: Country filter. Comma-separated values mean OR.

type.description: Transaction type IDs. The official tester describes 1 sale, 2 lead, 3 install, 4 click, 5 impression.

status.description: Conversion status IDs. The official tester describes 1 pending, 2 failed, 3 approved, 4 declined, 5 approved/invoiced, 6 approved/paid in, 7 approved/paid out.
